text: Hello? Speaker. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Elizabeth. I'm not available. I'm following because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. Have you been notified about these benefits yet? Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So you do have Medicare Part A and B, right? Can you hear me? I would suggest you have Medicare Part A and Part B. To mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound. Are you?
